name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with physical store locations nationwide.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating physical store locations across the United States. The company specializes in providing quick access to cash through various lending and financial service products designed for consumers with immediate financial needs. Based on their website navigation, ACE has been serving customers for years with a focus on convenience and fast funding options.

ACE Cash Express offers a range of financial products including installment loans, title loans, check cashing services, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services. They also mention online loan options and business services. The company maintains a customer service infrastructure with dedicated phone lines and email support for both general inquiries and online loan operations. Their store locator tool indicates a widespread physical presence, though their Colorado Denver location pages return 404 errors, suggesting either outdated URLs or location closures.

ACE differentiates itself through multi-service offerings beyond basic payday loans, including title loans, money transfers, bill payment services, and tax preparation. This positions them as a broader financial services hub rather than a single-product lender. The company also emphasizes compliance, as evidenced by their California Notice at Collection disclosure and state-specific loan availability restrictions displayed on their website.

The main caveat for consumers is that ACE operates in the emergency cash/short-term lending space, which typically involves high-cost financing. The website evidence is limited—both example URLs returned 404 errors—making it difficult to verify current rates, terms, or specific product details. Consumers should verify that specific services (like title loans) are actually available in their state, as the website explicitly warns that some loan types are not available in all states.
pros: Multiple financial services beyond loans: check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services
Online loan application option available in addition to in-store services
Widespread physical store network for face-to-face customer service
Dedicated customer service phone lines for both general inquiries and online operations
Title loans available as an alternative to installment loans
State-specific compliance practices including California Notice at Collection disclosures
Transparent about loan availability restrictions by state
cons: Company website has broken location pages (404 errors) making current service details difficult to verify
Some services explicitly unavailable in certain states, limiting accessibility
Operates in high-cost emergency lending category typically associated with APRs exceeding 36%
Limited current information accessible about rates, terms, or specific loan amounts
Store closures noted due to external events (Hurricane Ida) with unclear current status
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash access with same-day or next-day funding capability
Customers seeking multiple financial services at one provider (check cashing, bill pay, money transfers)
Individuals with vehicle title who qualify for title-based loans
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers in urgent need of small emergency cash who have access to a physical store location and prefer in-person service options. The main caveat is that specific products vary significantly by state, and consumers must verify service availability in their location before applying, as the website explicitly restricts certain loan types in certain states.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
